name: Homebrew
description: Installs Homebrew (macOS/Linux) globally. Skips if already installed.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This dev container has Homebrew (the open-source package manager) pre-installed and available on the PATH. Use `brew install <package>` to install packages, `brew upgrade` to upgrade, and `brew info <package>` to see package details. On Linux, Homebrew installs packages to `/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew`.
